title: Mazhuvannur Maha Siva Kshethram
tagline: Mazhuvannur Maha Siva Kshethram — spiritual town of Kerala

overview.short: Mazhuvannur Maha Siva Kshethram is an ancient Hindu Temple at Tharuvana in Wayanad district of the Indian state of Kerala.
overview.description: Mazhuvannur Maha Siva Kshethram is an ancient Hindu Temple at Tharuvana in Wayanad district of the Indian state of Kerala. The presiding deity is Lord Shiva; other deities are Arayil Bhagavathy, Shree Durga, Nandhi, Lord Ayyappa and Lord Ganapathi. This temple is situated on the highest peak in the areas of Karingari, Paliyana, and Tharuvana. Daily poojas (prayers) were performed there from ancient times.

routes.byAir: Fly to nearest airport + road transfer

howToReach.roadNote: Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

topPlaces.name: Mazhuvannur
topPlaces.description: Mazhuvannur (Literal meaning : The place where Axe has Fallen) is where many Hindus believe the axe of Shiva is believed to have fallen ) Mazhuvannur is a hilly village located 10 Kilometres from Mananthavady in Wayanad district, Kerala, India. The place is located near the small town of Tharuvana in Porunnannur Village.

topPlaces.name: Tharuvana
topPlaces.description: Tharuvana is a village in Vellamunda Panchayath of Wayanad district, Kerala, India. The place is a junction connecting the Vythiri-Tharuvana road to State Highway 54 running between Kuttiady and Mananthavady.

topPlaces.name: Karingari
topPlaces.description: Karingari is a village near Tharuvana in Vellamunda panchayath, Mananthavady area, Wayanad, Kerala, India.

topPlaces.name: Karat Shiva Temple
topPlaces.description: Karat Temple is a Hindu temple dedicated to god Shiva, located in the town of Kommayad near to Mananthavady, Kerala, India which is one of the oldest temples in Wayanad district which is formed approximately one thousand years ago. The temple was destroyed by Tipu Sultan in 18th century.

topPlaces.name: St. George Forane Church Kallody, Wayanad
topPlaces.description: St. George Forane Church Kallody is situated in Mananthavady taluk of Wayanad district.

image.alt: St. George Forane Church Kallody, Wayanad

topPlaces.name: Kallody
topPlaces.description: Kallody is a village in the Edavaka Grama panchayath of the Wayanad district, Kerala, India. It forms part of the Mananthavady Taluk.

topPlaces.name: Anchukunnu
topPlaces.description: Anjukunnu (or Anchukunnu) is a village in Wayanad district in the state of Kerala, India.

topPlaces.name: Kurumbalakotta
topPlaces.description: Kurumbalakotta (Malayalam: കുറുമ്പാലക്കോട്ട) is a hill in Kottathara of Wayanad district, Kerala. It is 20 km from Kalpetta.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Mazhuvannur Maha Siva Kshethram?
faq.a: The best time to visit Mazhuvannur Maha Siva Kshethram is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Mazhuvannur Maha Siva Kshethram?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Calicut International Airport, Kozhikode (66 km) and the nearest railway station is Mysuru Junction (96 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Mazhuvannur Maha Siva Kshethram?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Mazhuvannur Maha Siva Kshethram at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Mazhuvannur Maha Siva Kshethram?
faq.a: Stays in Mazhuvannur Maha Siva Kshethram start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Mazhuvannur Maha Siva Kshethram?
faq.a: The top attractions are Mazhuvannur, Tharuvana, Karingari, Karat Shiva Temple, St. George Forane Church Kallody, Wayanad.
